# GitHub Copilot Instructions

## Project Overview
This project is structured to facilitate modular development with clear separation of concerns. It includes HTML, CSS, JavaScript, and PHP components.

## Project Structure
- **HTML**: Contains the main structure of the web application.
- **CSS**: Stylesheets are organized in the `Css/` directory, promoting modular styling.
- **JavaScript**: Scripts are located in the `js/` directory, handling various functionalities.
- **PHP**: Server-side scripts are found in the `php_old/` directory.
- **Plugins**: External functionalities are managed in the `plugin/` directory.

## Developer Workflows
- Follow the modular approach for adding new features.
- Ensure that all new code adheres to the existing coding standards and conventions.
- Use the provided scripts for building and deploying the application.

## Integration Points
- The project may integrate with various external services, as indicated by the `plugin/` directory.
- Ensure that any new integrations are documented and follow the established patterns.

## Coding Conventions
- Maintain consistent naming conventions across files and functions.
- Comment code adequately to ensure clarity for future developers.

## Conclusion
These instructions should guide AI coding agents in understanding the architecture, workflows, and conventions of this project. For any further details, refer to the specific files in the project structure.
